idea-plugin.name: Claude Code Usage
idea-plugin.description:
Displays your Claude subscription usage limits in the IDE status bar.

Note: This plugin tracks subscription quota usage only (5-hour, 7-day limits). It does not track API tokens, costs, or conversation history.

Features:
  • Real-time usage percentage with auto-refresh every minute (configurable)
  • Reads credentials from the macOS Keychain (where Claude Code stores them) with fallback to the credentials file
  • Manual refresh button for instant updates
  • Color-coded progress indicator (green → yellow → red)
  • Time until quota reset
  • Detailed popup with all usage tiers (5-hour, 7-day, 7-day Sonnet, extra usage)
  • Configurable settings (Settings → Tools → Claude Code Usage)
  • Dark and light theme support
  • Error state display with actionable hints
  • Direct link to Claude settings

Requirements: Claude Code CLI installed and authenticated (~/.claude/.credentials.json)
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.3.0
  • macOS Keychain support: reads OAuth tokens from the Keychain (where Claude Code now stores them), with fallback to the credentials file
  • New "Use macOS Keychain" setting (default on, macOS only)
  • Dedicated error states and actionable popup hints for keychain access denied / prompt timeout
  • On first run, macOS will prompt once for keychain access — click Always Allow for your IDE
0.2.4
  • Fixed parse error when API returns null reset time for unused quotas (widget no longer falls into error state)
  • Configurable auto-refresh interval (1–60 minutes, default 1 minute)
  • Manual refresh button now has its own 5-second cooldown, independent of the auto-refresh interval
  • Reset time hidden in UI when API reports no reset
  • Max backoff on errors increased to 60 minutes
0.2.3
  • Refresh button disabled when last fetch was less than 1 minute ago
  • Exponential backoff on all API errors to reduce unnecessary calls
0.2.2
  • Countdown timer now shows days when reset time exceeds 24 hours (e.g. "2d 14h 1m")
0.2.1
  • Updated User-Agent header to fix usage API that stopped working
  • Exponential backoff retry on rate limiting
0.2.0
  • Settings panel (Settings → Tools → Claude Code Usage): configurable quota display, warning thresholds, credentials path
  • Refresh button in usage popup
  • Error state display with actionable hints
  • Dark and light theme support
  • Fixed widget visibility issues
  • Platform version bumped to 2024.1+
